emails.subject: Python Files Backup Needed Before Friday Release
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

Before we do the Friday release, I need you to create a backup of all the Python files in our project directory. We've had issues in the past where files got overwritten during deployment, so I want to make sure we have a safe copy.

Here's what I need:
- Back up all .py files from the /project folder
- Put them in our /backups directory
- Make sure to include a timestamp in the backup folder name so we know when it was created
- Keep the original file contents intact

Once you're done, please let the dev team know on Slack so everyone's aware we have a backup in place.

Thanks!
Sarah
